From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**[Ningbo](/wiki/Ningbo "Ningbo")** is a city in Zhejiang, China.

**Ningbo** may also refer to:

* [Ningbo Metropolitan Area](/wiki/Ningbo_Metropolitan_Area "Ningbo Metropolitan Area"), A metropolitan area including Ningbo and three other cities in Zhejiang, China

* [Ningbo dialect](/wiki/Ningbo_dialect "Ningbo dialect"), dialect of Wu, one of the subdivisions of Chinese spoken language
* [Port of Ningbo](/wiki/Port_of_Ningbo "Port of Ningbo"), in Ningbo, China
* [3543 Ningbo](/wiki/3543_Ningbo "3543 Ningbo"), main-belt asteroid
